T0206.title: Risk-Control Data
T0206.definition: A collection of user data leaked from financial platform risk-control systems, containing preliminary analysis and risk tags.
T0206.description: This data often includes sensitive information such as credit ratings, spending habits, and risk labels, leaked by insiders or third-party service providers. Underground actors use these precise profiles for customized marketing fraud, loan scams, and other illegal activities. Its targeted nature leads to a much higher scam success rate compared to random attacks.
T0206.usageExample: "Selling real-time IOU data, risk-control data, high volume, guaranteed first-hand source, good price."
